title: Gabriel
bodyText:
Early-30s dwarf, red beard with braided mustache, always smiling, tankard in hand. Runs **[[gond]]'s Craft** (the brewery) for the Monk Guild — and doesn't give a damn about Gond or guild orders. [[pc-felson|Felson]]'s brewing mentor and the closest thing he has to a fun uncle.

# Current truth
- Cured by [[pc-eddy|Eddy]] during the plague (S08); in thanks/parting he gave Felson **Gabriel's Keg** ([[gabriels-keg]]) — his months-long project combining a small keg with **mithril** as an amplifying ingredient. "If you lose it, I will find you and kill you."
- Inscription on the keg: *"Learn where you come from, uncover what you hold dear, and share all the joy you can."*
